title: British Columbia Programme Monthly Trendsheet - December 2025
content:
• In December 2025, BC LCFS average credit prices fell to a four-year low of $195.08, marking an 18.22% month-on-month decline from $238.54 in November and a 45.06% year-on-year drop from $355.08 in December 2024.
  • Credit prices fluctuated between $90 and $241.50 in December 2025, resulting in a spread of $151.50.
  • Annual credit volumes for 2025 increased by about 23.80%, and are currently at 1,730,041 compared to 1,405,671 in 2024. Volumes in December 2025 saw an increase of 6.16% as compared to December 2024, with volumes rising from 296,531 in December 2024 to 314,785 in December 2025.
  • This month witnessed an average ticket size of 15,739.25 volume per transfer, based on 20 transfers.
author: Adarsh Thakur
